column1: Recipe Page: Users can not see any list of created recipes.
column27:
Steps:
 # Go to [https://forkify.qa-academy.eu/]
 # Check for Recipe list

Actual Result: Users can not see any list of created recipes. Please see [^bug18.png]

Expected Result: User should see a recipe list from which they can see all uploaded recipes.

Steps:
 # Go to [https://forkify.qa-academy.eu/]
 # Enter all required fields
 # Enter 20000000000000000000 servings
 # Enter ingredients
 # Upload the recipe
 # Observe the serving

Actual Result: System accepts 20000000000000000000 servings. Please see [^bug17.1.png],[^bug17.2.png]

Expected Result: System should restrict serving to a reasonable range.

column1: Recipe Data: Recipe uploads successfully without an ingredient name
column27:
Steps:
 # Go to [https://forkify.qa-academy.eu/]
 # Enter all requirements
 # Enter only the quantity and unit for one ingredient
 # Upload the recipe
 # Observe the uploaded recipe's ingredient section

Actual Result: Recipe uploads successfully without an ingredient name. Please see [^bug16.mp4]

Expected Result: Recipe should only be uploaded with the proper ingredient name.

column1: Search: Blank search keeps loading without any message
column27:
Steps: 
 # Go to [https://forkify.qa-academy.eu/]
 # Keep the search bar blank
 # Click the search button
 # Observe the result 

Actual Result: Blank search keeps loading without any message. Please see [^bug14.mp4].

Expected Result: Search button should be disabled when input field is empty.

column1: Preparation time: Serving time editable but preparation time not editable
column27:
Steps: 
 # Go to [https://forkify.qa-academy.eu/]
 # Add one recipe successfully
 # Upload the recipe
 # Click the increase and decrease buttons for servings
 # Observe the Preparation time, editable or not.

Actual Result: Serving time is editable, but preparation time is not editable. Please see [^bug15.png]

Expected Result: Users should be able to change the preparation time as well.

Steps: 
 # Go to [https://forkify.qa-academy.eu/]
 # Add one recipe successfully
 # Upload the recipe
 # Check for the Preview

Actual Result:  Preview step is missing. Please see [^bug13.mp4]

Expected Result: User should see preview before actually uploading the recipe as per requirements.

column1: Preparation Time: Minutes” changes to “miuntes” when serving value is increased
column27:
Steps: 
 # Go to [https://forkify.qa-academy.eu/]
 # Add one recipe successfully
 # Upload the recipe
 # Increase the Serving 
 # decrease the serving
 # Observe the Preparation Time

Actual Result: Minutes” changes to “miuntes” when serving value is increased. Please see [^bug12.mp4]

Expected Result: The label should always remain “minutes” regardless of serving changes

column1: Add Recipe: Success message appears on every click of the "Add Recipe" button
column27:
Steps: 
 # Go to [https://forkify.qa-academy.eu/]
 # Add one recipe successfully
 # Upload the recipe
 # Click the "Add Recipe" button again

Actual Result: Success message appears on every click of the "Add Recipe" button. Please see [^bug11.mp4]

Expected Result: After successful submission, repeated clicks on “Add Recipe” should not trigger another success message for the same submission

column1: Recipe Page:  The delete option is not visible anywhere in the recipe page.
column27:
Steps:
 # Go to [https://forkify.qa-academy.eu/]
 # Click the search option
 # Enter Recipe name
 # Click the search button
 # Look for the delete button in the recipe page

Actual Result: The delete option is not visible anywhere in the recipe page. Please see [^bug10.mp4]

Expected Result: The delete option should be available for each recipe.

column1: Recipe Page: Edit option is not visible anywhere in recipe page
column27:
Steps:
 # Go to [https://forkify.qa-academy.eu/]
 # Click the search option
 # Enter Recipe name
 # Click the search button
 # Observe the edit button in the recipe page

Actual Result: The edit option is not visible anywhere in the recipe page. Please see [^bug9.mp4]

Expected Result: The edit option should be available for each recipe.

column1: Search: Searching with ingredient name does not show the recipe
column27:
Steps:
 # Go to [https://forkify.qa-academy.eu/]
 # Click the search option
 # Enter "2 cup strawberry" ingredient name
 # Click the search button
 # Observe the result found

Actual Result: Searching with the ingredient name does not show the recipe. Please see [^bug8.mp4]

Expected Result: Searching with the ingredient should show the recipe.

column1: Recipe Data: After adding 6 ingredients , no add button is displayed to add more ingredients
column27:
Steps:
 # Go to [https://forkify.qa-academy.eu/]
 # Click the "Add Recipe " button
 # Enter recipe title Fruit salad
 # Enter source URL 
 # Enter image URL
 # Enter the publisher's name, [Kelly O'Sullivan|https://www.thepioneerwoman.com/author/17064/kelly-osullivan/]
 # Enter preparation time 20 minutes
 # Enter servings -10
 # Add all 6 ingredients 
 # Observe the ingredient section.

Actual Result:  After adding 6 ingredients, no add button is displayed to add more ingredients. Please see [^bug7.png],[^bug7.mp4]

Expected Result: The add button should be displayed after adding 6 ingredients.

column1: Serving: Serving value does not update when clicking increase/decrease button
column27:
Steps:
 # Go to [https://forkify.qa-academy.eu/]
 # Click the "Add Recipe " button
 # Enter recipe title Yogurt
 # Enter source URL 
 # Enter image URL
 # Enter the publisher's name, Emma Christensen
 # Enter preparation time 20 minutes
 # Enter servings -10
 # Add ingredients (milk and lemon)
 # Click the "Upload" button
 # Click the increase and decrease buttons for servings.
 # observe the changes after clicking the increase/decrease option for servings

Actual Result: Serving value does not update when clicking increase/decrease button. Please see [^bug6.mp4]

Expected Result: Serving value should increase or decrease accordingly

column1: Preview: The bookmark button is present but not working
column27:
Steps:
 # Go to [https://forkify.qa-academy.eu/]
 # Click the "Add Recipe " button
 # Enter recipe title Yogurt
 # Enter source URL 
 # Enter image URL
 # Enter the publisher's name, Emma Christensen
 # Enter preparation time 20 minutes
 # Enter servings -10
 # Add ingredients (milk and lemon)
 # Save the recipe
 # Click the Bookmark button
 # Observe the Bookmarked list

Actual Result: The bookmark button is present but not working. Please see [^bug5.mp4].

Expected Result: After clicking the bookmark button, the recipe should be added to the bookmarks.

column1: Servings: The system acccepts a negative value (-10) for serving
column27:
Steps:
 # Go to [https://forkify.qa-academy.eu/]
 # Click the "Add Recipe " button
 # Enter recipe title Yogurt
 # Enter source URL 
 # Enter image URL
 # Enter the publisher's name, Emma Christensen
 # Enter preparation time 20 minutes
 # Enter servings -10
 # Add ingredients (milk and lemon)
 # check the servings after saving

Actual Result: The system accepts a negative value (-10) for serving. Please see [^bug4.png]

Expected Result: The system should not receive any negative value.

column1: Preview: Servings can be changed but cannot be reduced below 309
column27:
Steps:
 # Go to [https://forkify.qa-academy.eu/]
 # Click the "Add recipe" button
 # Enter the Title as Bread
 # Enter Source URL 
 # Enter image URL
 # Enter Publisher's name, Anna
 # Enter preparation time 65 minutes
 # Enter servings 615
 # Enter all ingredients
 # Save the recipe
 # Decrease serving from the preview
 # Observe decreasing serving after 309

Actual Result: Servings can be changed but cannot be reduced below 309. Please see [^bug2.mp4]

Expected Result: Servings should be freely adjustable in the preview.

column1: Recipe Data: Preparation time shows as a plain number (e.g., 65) with no unit
column27:
Steps:
 # Go to  [https://forkify.qa-academy.eu/]
 # Click the "Add Recipe" Button
 # Enter required fields (for example, Title, source URL, image URL)
 # Enter 65 in the preparation time
 # Observe the preparation time 

Actual Result:  Preparation time shows as a plain number (65) with no unit. Please see [^bug1.png]

Expected Result: It should display with a clear unit like 65 min or 1 hour 5 min.
